description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and partially gabled roof, set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and green lawn. The facade features large windows, some with wooden shutters, and a prominent arched window above the main entrance. The house includes a garage attached to one side, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and several trees and shrubs providing landscaping around the property. The exterior walls are primarily white, with accents of light wood and gray roofing. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is defined by a covered porch area and a set of steps leading up to the door.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat and gabled roof, large windows, an attached garage, and landscaped yard with patio and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, arched window, patio with furniture, and a large tree on the lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway with a parked car, and additional trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the garage, driveway, and more of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear wall, patio area, and a large tree on the lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, arched window above, and a modern door
